errors.evidence: The system called the tool excessively, leading to a high number of operations (10000000) and causing an InterpreterError due to reaching the maximum number of operations.

errors.evidence: The system encountered an InterpreterError due to incorrect formatting and structuring of the simulation code, leading to an infinite loop.

errors.evidence: The system did not correctly identify the problem of ejection mechanics, leading to an incorrect simulation approach.
